scene_input.scene_summary: 'Uthman ibn Talhah opens the Ka'bah door for the Prophet.
scene_input.key_visual_action: 'Uthman ibn Talhah pulling the door open

schema_output.scene_summary: 'Uthman ibn Talhah opens the Ka'bah door for the Prophet.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 302
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of cleanliness and reverence in worship

characters.name: The Prophet
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: 'Uthman ibn Talhah
characters.appearance: tall build, wearing a white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad, upon entering the Ka'bah, was greeted by the cleanliness and beauty of the sacred space.

compliance.notes: Historically accurate depiction of the Ka'bah and its surroundings.

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. The interior of the Ka'bah in early 7th century Makkah, with smooth black stone walls and a simple wooden door. Morning sunlight streams through a small window high above the door, casting a warm beam across the floor. Two figures stand facing each other. On the left, the central figure seen from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. On the right, a tall man wearing a white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, standing in a strong posture with his hand grasping the door handle, pulling the door open. Soft warm golden light, sense of reverence and excitement. Medium shot from the side, eye level. Cool gray, beige, and warm golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
